name: World Without Reason
short_description: A certain feeling of dread pervades a small southeastern island nation still recovering from its gruesome past. Miss Audacity finds herself caught in the center of a serial murder case spanning 8 years. Help her as she tries to remember the past in order to save her sister, her friends, and herself.
detailed_description:
Two years ago in the autumn of 2043, a mysterious figure known as the “Shadow Reaper” tore through the city-state of Calloway City before suddenly vanishing, taking 24 foreign Peacekeepers with him. Almost a year later in the summer of 2044, the Shadow Reaper struck again, this time causing a whopping 32 members of the Calloway City senate to fall into a coma.

Play as Miss Audacity, a callow youth who witnessed Shadow Reaper in the act. Help her remember the key details of the case and bring the Reaper to justice!

Can you reach a happy ending in this tragic tale of loss, adversity, redemption, and self determination?

This visual novel features:

  • World Without Reason: A story of loss, adversity, and redemption

  • Nice Weekend Read: 5-6 hours for story completion

  • Them's Fightin' Words: 4 Boss fights and 1 verbal assault

  • Putting a Voice to a Name: Partial voice acting for the main cast

  • Erm, Actually: A full glossary containing all characters, locations, and tricky terminology

  • Life Has Many Doors: 1 main ending, 6 alternate endings

  • Wall of Crazy: A chapter map showing all major events in chronological order

  • City of Secrets: Calloway City is filled with mysteries, some of which are best left alone
